labels.name: type:epic

labels.name: type:decision
labels.description: Product, architecture, data, or design decision

labels.description: Week 1 product, data, legal, and design gate

labels.name: phase:3-core-wiki
labels.description: Week 3 homepage, explore, songs, and packs

labels.name: phase:4-encyclopedia
labels.description: Week 4 partners, story, and game topics

labels.name: phase:5-quality
labels.description: Week 5 accessibility, performance, security, and PWA

labels.name: phase:6-release
labels.description: Week 6 public preview and community readiness

labels.name: area:frontend
labels.description: React, Rsbuild, routing, UI, and browser behavior

labels.name: area:data
labels.description: Schemas, static catalog, provenance, and updates

labels.name: area:performance
labels.description: Performance, bundle, images, and Core Web Vitals

labels.name: area:runtime
labels.description: Rust/WASM chart runtime retained for later

labels.name: priority:p2
labels.description: Useful but can be cut from the preview

labels.name: status:needs-decision
labels.description: Requires a recorded decision before implementation

labels.name: status:needs-design
labels.description: Requires UX or visual design evidence

labels.name: status:human-required
labels.description: Needs maintainer judgment or manual evidence

labels.name: status:blocked
